# Herberts Travel

> Family-run coach and bus hire serving Bedfordshire, Hertfordshire and Cambridgeshire since 1990.

## Services

- **School Transport**: Daily school runs with DBS-checked drivers, CCTV on every vehicle, seatbelts fitted. Trusted by 15+ schools.
- **Private Hire**: Weddings, parties, corporate events, airport transfers. Flexible scheduling.
- **Day Trips & Excursions**: Seaside, countryside, theatre trips, sporting events. Groups of any size.

## Fleet

37 vehicles including double-decker coaches (up to 88 passengers), touring coaches (up to 57 passengers), and premium double-deckers (up to 78 passengers). All regularly inspected, CCTV and seatbelts fitted.

## Contact

- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/44XXXXXXXXXX
- Email: booking@herberts-travel.co.uk
- Quote form: https://www.herbertstravel.co.uk/contact

## Service Area

Bedfordshire, Hertfordshire and Cambridgeshire, United Kingdom.

## Key Facts

- Family-run since 1990
- 30+ years experience
- 500,000+ miles driven
- 37 vehicles in fleet
- All drivers DBS-checked
- CCTV on every vehicle
